decks.notes: This Dimir Tempo deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan while applying pressure to quickly end the game. It makes use of powerful cards like Brainstorm, Fatal Push, and Thoughtseize to control the board and keep the opponent on the back foot. Murktide Regent and Barrowgoyf provide strong clock for finishing the game, while cards like Daze and Force of Will help protect your creatures and spells. The deck also includes efficient removal spells like Snuff Out and Wasteland to deal with threats and disrupt the opponent's mana base.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly and efficiently set up the combo of Show and Tell with Omniscience on the field, allowing the player to cast powerful spells for free. Additionally, the inclusion of Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Lórien Revealed provides support and synergy for the combo. The deck also includes powerful finishers in Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and The One Ring to quickly close out games. The deck aims to disrupt opponents with countermagic and card draw while assembling the combo pieces for a game-winning turn.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures and disruptive cards to control the board while applying pressure on the opponent. It combines Death & Taxes elements with a unique twist, incorporating Yorion as a companion to provide additional value and synergy with the blink effects of cards like Flickerwisp. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while deploying threats efficiently, utilizing cards like Stoneforge Mystic to search for equipment and Aether Vial to cheat creatures into play. By consistently disrupting the opponent and applying pressure, this deck aims to outpace and overwhelm the opponent before they can establish their own game plan.

The key idea of this Turbo Necro deck is to quickly generate mana through various acceleration cards like Simian Spirit Guide and Dark Ritual, then combo off with Necrodominance to summon powerful creatures like Beseech the Mirror. The deck aims to win the game as fast as possible by assembling the necessary pieces for the combo and overwhelming the opponent before they have a chance to respond. The use of Pact of Negation ensures protection from opposing disruption while cards like Gaea's Will and Valakut Awakening provide additional utility and card advantage.

This Dimir Tempo deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with efficient threats. By utilizing cards like Thoughtseize, Force of Will, and Fatal Push to disrupt the opponent, and combining them with creatures like Orcish Bowmasters, Murktide Regent, and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares, this deck can control the game and close it out quickly. With access to card draw in Brainstorm and Ponder, along with versatile removal options in Snuff Out and Wasteland, this deck can outmaneuver opponents and come out on top in the Legacy format.

The deck focuses on controlling the game early with disruption spells like Force of Will and Thoughtseize, while using efficient removal like Fatal Push and Wasteland to keep the opponent's board in check. It then transitions into a more aggressive strategy with creatures like Brazen Borrower and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares, supported by the card advantage offered by Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Brainstorm. The goal is to maintain tempo throughout the game, disrupting the opponent's plans while applying pressure to close out the game quickly.

The main focus of the deck is to quickly and aggressively cycle through the deck to reach key combo pieces, such as Balustrade Spy and Undercity Informer, in order to win the game in a single turn. The deck relies on the high number of spells and mana acceleration like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal to quickly cast spells and combo off. The inclusion of cards like Pact of Negation and Cabal Therapy helps protect the combo and disrupt opponent's strategies. Ultimately, the goal is to assemble the combo and win the game by emptying the deck and casting Thassa's Oracle.

The deck aims to generate a critical mass of fast mana and card draw spells to quickly assemble the resources needed to cast a powerful storm spell like Tendrils of Agony. Using cards like Dark Ritual, Lotus Petal, and Lion's Eye Diamond, the deck can generate enough storm count to deal lethal damage in a single turn. Additionally, having access to Wishclaw Talisman and Burning Wish provides the flexibility to search for specific combo pieces or answers as needed. The deck relies on speed, resource management, and careful sequencing to execute its game plan effectively.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy while maintaining board control through a mix of hand disruption, removal spells, and counterspells. The deck aims to apply pressure by playing efficient threats such as Baleful Strix and Murktide Regent. Additionally, the inclusion of planeswalkers like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and additional ways to interact with the opponent's cards. The deck also has the flexibility to adapt to different matchups by utilizing cards like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to address specific threats.

This deck focuses on using Mystic Forge and Urza's Saga to generate immense value by casting artifacts from the top of the library. The key strategy revolves around using mana acceleration with Grim Monolith and Urza's Tower to quickly get Mana to cast the high-cost artifacts. Karn, the Great Creator and Tezzeret, Cruel Captain provide additional options and ways to utilize artifacts effectively. The deck also includes cards like Glaring Fleshraker and Kozilek's Command for control and disruption. The ultimate goal is to establish a strong board presence and overwhelm the opponent with powerful artifacts.

The deck is focused on efficiently utilizing mana and spell-based synergies to generate a large storm count and win the game with a powerful storm payoff card like Tendrils of Agony. It utilizes cards like Lion's Eye Diamond, Lotus Petal, and Dark Ritual to generate mana quickly, while also including card draw and tutoring effects to find key combo pieces. By casting multiple spells in a single turn, the deck can quickly build up a high storm count to overpower the opponent and secure victory through a lethal Tendrils of Agony or other win condition.

The deck focuses on using explosive mana acceleration and card draw to build up a storm count, allowing for a powerful finish with cards like Tendrils of Agony. Cards like Lion's Eye Diamond and Dark Ritual help generate mana quickly, while Brainstorm and Echo of Eons help dig for combo pieces. Burning Wish acts as a tutor for specific answers or win conditions, and Silence disrupts opponents' plans. The deck aims to assemble the necessary pieces quickly and efficiently to execute its game-winning combo.

The main strategy of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo of Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage to create a 20/20 Indestructible Marit Lage token. Green Sun's Zenith and Crop Rotation help find the necessary pieces, while Elvish Reclaimer and Knight of the Reliquary can also find Dark Depths. The deck also includes cards like Flagstones of Trokair and Karakas for additional utility and protection. With efficient mana acceleration from cards like Mox Diamond and lands like Yavimaya, Cradle of Growth, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with its powerful combo.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on utilizing efficient creatures such as Sand Scout, Amped Raptor, and Guide of Souls to apply pressure on the opponent. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Static Prison and Hexing Squelcher to control the board. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Ocelot Pride provide additional support and tools for victory. The mana base is optimized with a mix of fetch lands and dual lands to ensure consistent access to the necessary colors of mana. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with fast and aggressive creatures while maintaining board control.

The main concept of this deck is to maintain control through countering spells and disrupting opponents' strategies while also applying consistent pressure and dealing damage quickly with aggressive creatures like Delver of Secrets, Dragon's Rage Channeler, and Murktide Regent. The deck also utilizes efficient card draw and manipulation spells like Brainstorm and Ponder to ensure a steady flow of resources and threats. Additionally, the inclusion of disruptive cards like Daze, Force of Will, and Wasteland helps to further disrupt the opponent's game plan and keep them on the back foot.

This control deck focuses on using artifacts to lock down the opponent's resources and control the board. With powerful cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Urza's Saga, this deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while establishing a strong board presence. By utilizing cards like Trinisphere and Kozilek's Command, the deck can slow down the opponent's progress and eventually overwhelm them with powerful threats like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Ugin, Eye of the Storms. The combination of artifact synergies and powerful control elements makes this deck a formidable force in Legacy 1 vs 1.
